para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 要操作 ATC 刀库，请执行以下步骤。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:14px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:48px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:avoid; border:none; tabstops:57px left ;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:173px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:avoid; border:none; tabstops:57px left ;

list.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:89px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:200px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:89px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:200px left ;

text-align:left; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:89px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:200px left ;
li.text: [自动工具快换装置操作面板]

li.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:89px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:200px left ;

text-align:left; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:89px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:200px left ;

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:14px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:75px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-19px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:108px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:219px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-19px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:108px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:219px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-19px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:108px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:219px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:-19px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:108px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:219px left ;
li.text: 按下 ATC 操作面板上的顺行或逆时针按钮。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:14px; margin-top:10px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:48px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 至此，ATC 刀库操作步骤完成。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:14px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:48px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-before:always; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
